research_series.series_name: Final All-to-All Inference Matrix, Guardrails, and Validation Protocol

core_interpretation: The file captures the final safety philosophy and validation requirements, but the all-to-all matrix and validation protocol are incomplete and need a manual synthesis pass.
usable_elements: validation philosophy: external validation, calibration, missing data handling, explainability, traceability
recommendation: Use as final validation/guardrail scaffold, then build complete v1.0 package by merging cleaned trees 001-035 plus manual all-to-all synthesis.
